reviews.text: I waited over 45 minutes just to open a simple checking account at the downtown branch. The staff seemed overwhelmed and no one explained the fees clearly.
The mobile app is super easy to use! I love the fingerprint login and instant balance updates. Makes banking so much more convenient.
Applied for a credit card online and got approved in less than 24 hours. The process was smooth and the welcome bonus is great.
Had to visit the branch to resolve a dispute on my account. The teller, Maria, was polite but it took three visits to get things sorted. Not ideal.
Customer support was helpful when I called about a suspicious transaction. They froze my card right away and issued a new one within two days.
The app keeps crashing every time I try to deposit a check. I’ve reinstalled it twice and still no luck. Super frustrating!
Branch staff are friendly, but the lines are always long during lunch hour. Wish they had more tellers.
I opened my account online and it was quick, but I never received my debit card in the mail. Had to call twice to get it resent.
The loan officer, Mr. Patel, explained everything clearly and helped me get a good rate on my car loan. Very satisfied!
I like the budgeting tools in the mobile app, but sometimes the notifications are delayed. Still, it’s better than my old bank.
Applied for a personal loan and the process was confusing. Got conflicting info from the website and the branch staff.
The branch on Main Street is always clean and the staff greet you with a smile. I appreciate the personal touch.
I had to dispute a fraudulent charge and it took almost two weeks to get my money back. Not happy with the slow response.
Mobile app is okay, but I wish it had more features like bill splitting. Transfers work fine though.
The staff at the branch were helpful, but I had to wait 30 minutes just to speak to someone about my mortgage application.
I love how quickly I can deposit checks with the app. Never had an issue and the funds are available the next day.
Customer service reps are polite, but it takes forever to get through on the phone. Hold times are ridiculous.
Opened a savings account for my daughter and the process was straightforward. The branch manager even gave her a piggy bank!
The ATM at the branch was out of order, so I had to wait in line inside. Not a huge deal, but inconvenient.
I had a mixed experience applying for a credit card. The online form was easy, but I had to call twice to activate it.
The mobile app is terrible. It logs me out randomly and customer support just tells me to update it. Waste of time.
I appreciate the fraud alerts I get via text. Helped me catch a suspicious charge right away.
The branch staff are nice, but the parking lot is always full. Makes quick visits a hassle.
I had to visit the branch three times to get my name corrected on my account. Staff were apologetic, but it shouldn’t have taken that long.
The app interface is clean and easy to navigate. Love being able to set up travel notices in seconds.
Applied for a home loan and the process was slow. Got approved eventually, but communication could have been better.
I’m really disappointed with the monthly maintenance fees. No one told me about them when I opened my account.
The teller, James, was super helpful when I needed to wire money overseas. He explained the fees and timing clearly.
The mobile app is decent, but it doesn’t always show pending transactions right away. Not a dealbreaker, but annoying.
Had a frustrating experience disputing a charge. The process was slow and I had to follow up multiple times.
